title: HalalCraft
description: Welcome to HalalCraft, where Minecraft becomes a little more inclusive! This pack introduces mechanics that reflect Islamic dietary rules. Players can no longer eat pork-based foods like cooked porkchops or raw pork, staying true to their beliefs.
body: # HalalCraft HalalCraft is a Minecraft datapack designed to bring meaningful representation for Muslim players by introducing mechanics that align with Islamic beliefs. This is the first step toward making Minecraft more inclusive and immersive for everyone, while also adding new challenges and cultural elements to the game. ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command.
